title: SPBR
description: A PBR textures pack based on VNR,which in order to provide Physical properties and parallax details for vanilla 16x textures.
body:
# SPBR Shulker's PBR

A renewed textures pack based on **VNR**,which in order to provide Physical properties and parallax details for vanilla 16x textures.  

**---SPBR-21---**  
![SPBR-21](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa7e3235c88bfd3e23d32674a678df596e061d53.jpeg)

**PBR:**  
![PBR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9ff9433f7b836244de0a2e0f825f08f4e7d0223.jpeg)
![Stone Cutter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b25a1c75d6fa041d3ed13ae6b8e8db9a81fe412c.jpeg)  
**Parallax:**  
![Parallax](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35084dd87332a36e387e553199b3e00dfa8f3176.jpeg)
![Wood Parallax](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6ad9131abf6f672c268d8e86cf493de10d77eab.jpeg)  
**Sub-Surface Scattering:**  
![SSS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad345c5fa67b28a9ca14c99a0cc869b28c306d7b.jpeg)  
**3D Model:**  
![3D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28c29c4e51dcad30c29d624fbde941d4fff40a8e.jpeg)

![Piston](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c76e2c07499e6530b130a49b42c4ff6a57686c27.jpeg)

# How to configure your shader to get the best visuals of SPBR:
**First**, you need to check that if your shader support **LabPBR** & **Parallax**.  
**Here are some verified shaders:**
-  1.iterationRP
-  2.BSL
-  3.Complementary
-  4.PTGI GFME
-  5.Bliss
-  6.Photon
-  7.Astralex
-  8.Kappa
-  9.Nostalgia
-  10.Sundial  

**Second**, check the shader settings and make sure you have turned **LabPBR** & **Parallax** support on.  
**Then**, if your shader have functions below, turn it on to get better visuals: 
- Voxel Parallax
- Generate normal by parallax
- SSPT or PT support
- Emission
- Sub-Surface Scattering (SSS)
- Disable hardcoded Emission,Light source(PT/SSPT),SSS  
- _If you are using PTGI or PTGI GFME, remember turn on the FULL_RT_REFLECTION_  

**SPBR OFFICIAL PATCH PACKS:**  
*[GlowingOre](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spbr-glowingore)*  
![GlowingOre](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7rohkYfM/d9c74b937868cbe71dbc10dcd97d38af9a37beca_96.webp)

**_SPBR OFFICIALLY RELEASED ON MODRINTH IN 240614_**
